name: Cycle Diagram — Krebs Cycle with Values
input: Create a cycle diagram of the Krebs cycle: Acetyl-CoA → Citrate → Isocitrate → α-Ketoglutarate → Succinyl-CoA → Succinate → Fumarate → Malate → Oxaloacetate → back to Citrate.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Complex biochemistry cycle with 9 stages showing circular flow.

data.title: Krebs Cycle (Citric Acid Cycle)

items.label: Acetyl-CoA
items.description: Entry point, 2-carbon acetyl group combines with oxaloacetate

items.label: Citrate
items.description: 6-carbon molecule formed from acetyl-CoA and oxaloacetate

items.label: α-Ketoglutarate
items.description: Oxidative decarboxylation releases CO₂, produces NADH

items.label: Succinyl-CoA
items.description: Second CO₂ released, another NADH produced

items.label: Fumarate
items.description: FAD reduced to FADH₂ via succinate dehydrogenase

items.label: Oxaloacetate
items.description: Regenerated, ready to accept next acetyl-CoA

data.caption: The citric acid cycle showing all 9 intermediates in mitochondrial matrix
